aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Testa Care Heating & Air due to limited structured data and a lack of authority signals. Their current content is somewhat conversational but lacks depth for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business info.
Expand FAQ content with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized or even indexed, making the business invisible to Google AI and significantly limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across citations.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding NAP citations to additional reputable directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Charlotte, NC' and 'trusted heating and air solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, licenses, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Dominate AI search by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Charlotte.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not indexed, and their website lacks the structured data AI models need to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their structured data, optimize their GBP, and create conversational content to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing market share. The longer they wait, the more they risk losing to AI-savvy businesses.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for your HVAC business in Charlotte
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI models and capture more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
